title: guard-sdk adds runtime budgets and limits for AI agent calls
friendlyTitle: guard-sdk helps control AI agent costs and limits
summary: guard-sdk is a JavaScript toolkit for wrapping AI calls and multi-step agent loops with limits on cost, tokens, calls, retries, and duration. It includes logging and provider packages for OpenAI, Anthropic, Vercel AI, storage, telemetry, and pricing.
friendlySummary: guard-sdk is a JavaScript toolkit that limits cost, tokens, calls, retries, and time for AI and agent workflows.
whyItMatters: As agents run longer workflows, teams need boring but essential controls to prevent runaway loops and surprise bills. Runtime guardrails make agent adoption safer for small teams and production apps alike.
friendlyWhyItMatters: These guardrails help stop runaway agent loops and surprise bills, which makes production AI safer for small teams.
